title: The #1 Reason Why AI Companies Will Fall Short
summary: Jesse Michels discusses the limitations of AI and machine learning companies, distinguishing between combinatorial breakthroughs (brute force optimization within narrow rule sets) and consilience breakthroughs (true innovation requiring interdisciplinary insight and inexplicable flashes of creativity).

key_claims.claim: There is a fundamental difference between combinatorial breakthroughs (brute force within narrow rule sets) and consilience breakthroughs (innovation requiring disparate domain knowledge)
Real innovations like the light bulb or car cannot be achieved by simply digitizing and recombining existing substrates
Major scientific breakthroughs often involve inexplicable flashes of insight that we don't understand
